implementation_summary.summary: CP00-679 bridges the RP22 External Integrations I P04 UI evidence tail and P05 fixture/golden foundation over 150 planned units from RP22.P04.M06.S05 through RP22.P05.M03.S08. It covers synthetic fixture, test/golden, Hermes evidence, Claude review, closeout handoff, scope inventory, contract draft, type/shape, and primary implementation foundation rows while keeping runtime paths closed.

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-679 RP22.P04.M06.S05-RP22.P05.M03.S08 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
